citation.volume_title: A taxonomy for learning, teaching, and assessing: A revision of bloom’s taxonomy of educational objectives, complete edition

A taxonomy for learning, teaching, and assessing: A revision of bloom’s taxonomy of educational objectives, complete edition. Longman Publishing Group.

citation.journal_title: Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences
